summary: Merged WIP decompilation/matching PR for VS Records menu diagram code. The PR body says it added more matches and documentation in mndiagram and mndiagram2 and started matching mndiagram3. Evidence shows broad edits across src/melee/mn/mndiagram*.c/.h/static.h, new Diagram3 forward/type/header coverage, matching-oriented local reshaping, typed/signature adjustments, and bot-reported code-match gains including 6 new matched functions and 18 improved unmatched items, with 2 reported unmatched regressions.

key_files.role: Primary new matching body; largest changed file, with bot-reported new matches and improvements in main/melee/mn/mndiagram3.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: mndiagram3.c +563/-1

text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: new matches mnDiagram3_80247008, mnDiagram3_80246F2C, fn_80246E64, fn_80246E04; improvements mnDiagram3_80245BA4, mnDiagram3_8024714C, mnDiagram3_80246D40, .sdata, .sdata2
pr_body: start matching mndiagram3 as well

text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: mnDiagram2_PopulateStatRows 95.35% to 100%; Create, GetRankedName, CreateStatRow, GetRankedFighter, UpdateHeader, HandleInput, UpdateScrollArrows improved

key_files.role: Small related menu-file edit; exact behavior not visible in loaded diff excerpt.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: mnvibration.c +5/-4

what_changed: Started or expanded decompilation matching for mndiagram3, with the bot reporting four new fully matched mndiagram3 functions and three large mndiagram3 function improvements.
Improved mndiagram and mndiagram2 matches, including bot-reported full matches for mnDiagram_PopupInputProc and mnDiagram2_PopulateStatRows.
Added Diagram3 declarations across forward/types/header/static-header surfaces.
Adjusted mndiagram signatures and types, including Point3d use for mnDiagram_803EE728 and int arg3 for mnDiagram_80241E78 in both source and header.
Changed mndiagram input code to use Menu_GetAllInputs and to store the returned HSD_GObjProc so proc->flags_3 can be assigned.
Reshaped mndiagram2 local control flow and locals in functions such as UpdateHeader, HandleInput, CreateStatRow, PopulateStatRows, UpdateScrollArrows, InitUserData, Create, and GetRankedFighter.
Introduced or adjusted matching tactics including PAD_STACK in selected functions and #pragma dont_inline around mnDiagram_CountUnlockedFighters.
Bot report recorded overall matched-code improvement of +0.03% / +1144 bytes, 6 new matches, 18 unmatched-item improvements, and 2 unmatched-item regressions.

smart_moves.text: Synchronized a recovered function signature between implementation and header for mnDiagram_80241E78 instead of leaving the header stale.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mndiagram.c and mndiagram.h both change arg3 from s32 to int

smart_moves.text: Introduced Diagram3 into forward and module-specific headers while adding the large mndiagram3 body work, keeping declaration surfaces aligned with the new matching scope.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: forward.h adds Diagram3 forward declaration
changed_files.jsonl: mndiagram3.c, mndiagram3.h, mndiagram3.static.h, types.h changed

smart_moves.text: Replaced one generic entity lookup path in mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader with explicit name-mode/fighter-mode helper calls, making mode-dependent behavior clearer in source.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader uses mnDiagram_GetNameByIndex_s or mnDiagram_GetFighterByIndex_s based on is_name_mode

smart_moves.text: Kept repeated stat-row creation in mnDiagram2_Create as a natural loop rather than expanded repeated calls.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_Create uses do/while j < 10 to call mnDiagram2_CreateStatRow

smart_moves.text: Captured bot-reported regression information rather than presenting the PR as a clean improvement only.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: regressions in mnDiagram_80242C0C and mndiagram2 .sdata2

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a function body proves a signature, update the owning header in the same PR slice.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_80241E78 arg3 changed from s32 to int in both source and header
decomp_standards.truthful-headers-and-includes

decomp_lessons.lesson: Mode-specific menu helper calls can be more reviewable than a generic wrapper when the local control flow already branches on the mode.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader branches on is_name_mode and calls mnDiagram_GetNameByIndex_s or mnDiagram_GetFighterByIndex_s
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader improved 87.78% to 94.18%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Natural loops remain useful in matching-oriented code when the repeated operation is a fixed row population with varying index/offset state.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_Create uses a do/while loop to populate 10 stat rows
decomp_standards.natural-loops

decomp_lessons.lesson: Typed coordinate data should use the more precise local point/vector type when callsites and data layout support it.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_803EE728 changes from Vec3[3] to Point3d[3]
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_PopupAnimProc local pos changes from Vec3 to Point3d and lb_8000B1CC casts use Point3d*

decomp_lessons.lesson: Matching progress reports may include both new matches and regressions; intake should record regressions explicitly for follow-up instead of treating the PR as uniformly positive.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: 6 new matches, 18 improvements, 2 regressions

naming_conventions.name: Diagram3
naming_conventions.convention: Continuation of Diagram/Diagram2 type naming for the third diagram module.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: forward.h adds typedef struct Diagram3 Diagram3
changed_files.jsonl: mndiagram3.h and types.h changed

naming_conventions.name: mnDiagram3_*
naming_conventions.convention: mndiagram3 functions use the mnDiagram3_ module prefix, with address-style suffixes still used where semantics are not recovered.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: mnDiagram3_80247008, mnDiagram3_80246F2C, mnDiagram3_80245BA4, mnDiagram3_8024714C, mnDiagram3_80246D40
decomp_standards.conservative-naming

naming_conventions.name: is_name_mode
naming_conventions.convention: Boolean-like mode values are named by menu state role and used to select name-mode versus fighter-mode paths.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader, PopulateStatRows, Create use is_name_mode/is_name
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_InputProc checks data->is_name_mode

naming_conventions.name: entity_idx/entity_val
naming_conventions.convention: When code must handle either fighter or name records, neutral entity_* locals are used for index/value roles.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_Create introduces entity_idx and entity_val
diff_excerpt: #pragma dont_inline on before mnDiagram_CountUnlockedFighters and reset after
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Pragmas are exception tactics under current standards; PR evidence shows use but does not include adjacent-function objdiff proof for why it was necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK in selected functions and removed PAD_STACK in mnDiagram_OnFrame.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_PopupAnimProc adds PAD_STACK(24)
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_HandleInput adds PAD_STACK(40)
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_GetRankedFighter adds PAD_STACK(8)
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_OnFrame removes PAD_STACK(0x28)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: PAD_STACK is a matching tactic requiring narrow verifier evidence; bot report shows score effects but does not prove each PAD_STACK use independently.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted local declaration order, local integer widths, and casts to shape MWCC codegen.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_80241E78 declaration order changes around jobj/jobj2/data
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_CreateStatRow changes int r22 to u32 r22 and u16 iconId path to int r21
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_PopulateStatRows uses int var_r28 with u8 casts at helper boundaries
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: The diff supports matching-oriented local reshaping, but exact assembly motivation is inferred from bot score changes rather than explicit reviewer/author notes.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced a byte/base pointer for table-relative accesses where offsets cross typed subregions.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_PopupAnimProc uses char* base = (char*) mnDiagram_803EE728 and offset casts to Point3d* and AnimLoopSettings*
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows uses u8* base = (u8*) &mnDiagram2_803EEAD0 and base + 0x9C
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: This can be a bridge tactic for mixed embedded data. Current standards prefer real fields/types when recoverable; no full struct recovery evidence is present in the slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Stored return value of HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 to assign proc->flags_3 after changing menu input proc.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: PopupInputProc and InputProc introduce HSD_GObjProc* proc and assign proc->flags_3 = HSD_GObj_804D783C
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: mnDiagram_PopupInputProc reached 100%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_or_note: Supported for these functions by diff and bot score, but no broader convention should be inferred.

notes: The loaded raw diff is truncated, so detailed mndiagram3 implementation changes and mnvibration.c hunks are not visible in the excerpt.
The PR body says 'still WIP', but metadata says the PR was merged; intake records both without inferring final author intent beyond merge metadata.
No human review comments are available; review feedback is limited to the bot report.
The bot report provides match percentages and regressions, but the slice does not include build logs, objdiff command lines, or per-tactic validation for each local/codegen tactic.
Some lessons are intentionally scoped to files/functions visible in the diff and should not be promoted as broad standards without curator review.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep recovered headers synchronized with source signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2141 changed mnDiagram_80241E78 arg3 from s32 to int in both src/melee/mn/mndiagram.c and src/melee/mn/mndiagram.h, illustrating the truthful-header practice of updating the owning header when a body proves a signature.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_80241E78 source/header signature update
decomp_standards.truthful-headers-and-includes

accepted_candidate_records.title: Record regressions alongside match gains
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2141's bot report showed substantial match progress but also regressions in mnDiagram_80242C0C and mndiagram2 .sdata2; postmortems should preserve both signals for follow-up search.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: 6 new matches, 18 improvements, 2 regressions

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram3 belongs to the mn VS Records diagram module family
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2141 adds Diagram3 declarations and substantial mndiagram3 matching work under src/melee/mn, with the body describing 'start matching mndiagram3 as well' and the bot reporting mndiagram3 function matches/improvements.
evidence_refs: pr_body: start matching mndiagram3 as well
changed_files.jsonl: mndiagram3.c +563/-1, mndiagram3.h +15/-2, mndiagram3.static.h +34/-0
diff_excerpt: forward.h adds Diagram3
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: mndiagram3 new matches and improvements
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoping fact for future curator/search tasks, but should be reviewed against current source before being added as a path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: Pragma and PAD_STACK tactics in menu matching need explicit per-function verifier notes
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2141 used #pragma dont_inline and several PAD_STACK adjustments while the bot report showed match progress, but the slice lacks per-tactic objdiff/build justification. This supports reinforcing the existing standard that such tactics need narrow evidence rather than creating a new accepted rule.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: #pragma dont_inline around mnDiagram_CountUnlockedFighters
diff_excerpt: PAD_STACK additions/removal
text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: match improvements and regressions
decomp_standards.matching-tactics-need-evidence
decomp_standards.avoid-pragmas-register-asm
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate is a reinforcement/example for existing standards, not a new standard; curator should decide whether to add PR 2141 as an illustrative evidence case.

source_update_candidates.title: mndiagram2 contains mode-dependent name/fighter stat-row and header logic
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2141 changes mndiagram2 functions that branch on is_name_mode to choose name or fighter helpers and to populate stat rows for name/fighter mode.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_UpdateHeader branches to mnDiagram_GetNameByIndex_s or mnDiagram_GetFighterByIndex_s
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_Create derives entity_idx/entity_val based on is_name
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram2_PopulateStatRows chooses name/fighter index and passes to CreateStatRow
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful subsystem path fact, but should be validated against current source before source-corpus update.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the mndiagram3 function bodies as fully understood from this slice; the loaded diff is truncated and only bot match names/percentages are visible.
Do not infer that #pragma dont_inline or PAD_STACK are generally acceptable style from this PR; current standards treat them as evidence-requiring exceptions.
Do not claim human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments or reviews are present.
Do not treat the bot report as proof that every changed hunk improved matching; it also reports regressions and does not provide per-hunk validation.
Do not promote the Point3d change into a broad rule beyond this local coordinate-data case without checking current source/type evidence.
